evals.prompt: I need to find micro-influencers on TikTok in Germany for a skincare brand launch
evals.expected_output: AI prompt search walkthrough with TikTok filters, audience vetting, and collection workflow

assertions.name: ai_search
assertions.description: Mentions AI prompt-based search or natural-language search for finding creators

assertions.name: tiktok_filters
assertions.description: Suggests TikTok-specific filters or parameters like location, follower range, content category

assertions.name: audience_vetting
assertions.description: Mentions audience demographics verification or fake follower detection

assertions.name: collections
assertions.description: Mentions saving creators to collections or organizing shortlisted creators

evals.prompt: How do I set up campaign tracking for 15 Instagram creators? I'm on the Pro plan
evals.expected_output: Campaign setup walkthrough with plan limit warning for Pro (10 seats vs 15 needed)

assertions.name: campaign_setup
assertions.description: Walks through creating a campaign and adding creators by handle

assertions.name: content_tracking
assertions.description: Mentions automatic story detection or real-time content tracking

assertions.name: kpi_dashboard
assertions.description: Mentions KPI dashboard with EMV, CPM, reach, or engagement metrics

assertions.name: plan_limit_warning
assertions.description: Flags the Pro plan campaign seat limit (10 seats) vs the 15 creators needed

evals.prompt: A creator is charging €3,000 per post and claims 200K engaged followers — how do I verify this?
evals.expected_output: Creator vetting workflow with fake follower check, engagement benchmarks, and audience verification

assertions.name: fake_follower_check
assertions.description: Mentions fake follower detection or audience authenticity scoring

assertions.name: engagement_benchmarks
assertions.description: Mentions engagement rate benchmarks (1-3% for 200K followers) or comparison to category averages

assertions.name: growth_analysis
assertions.description: Mentions follower growth chart analysis or suspicious spike detection

assertions.name: report_credit_cost
assertions.description: Mentions that unlocking audience data costs a report credit
